.editorconfig.general_idea: Refactor .editorconfig to use a glob pattern for frontend and config files instead of a specific JSON glob.
Reorder .editorconfig sections to group preference settings together.
.editorconfig.before:
# Change these settings to your own preference
indent_style = space
indent_size = 4

# We recommend you to keep these unchanged
.editorconfig.after:
# We recommend you to keep these unchanged
...
# Change these settings to your own preference
indent_style = space
indent_size = 4

package.json.general_idea: Update Node.js engine requirement to version 14.15.0 or higher to align with JDK 11 era tooling standards.
Replace legacy Grunt-based build and test scripts with modern Angular CLI and Webpack-based scripts.
Remove obsolete Grunt and Karma dependencies that are no longer used in the modern JHipster stack.
Add modern Angular framework dependencies (v11) to support the updated frontend architecture.
Add modern build tooling dependencies including Angular CLI, Webpack, and Jest.
Update JHipster generator dependency to version 7.0.0-beta.0 to match the new project structure.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin to use annotationProcessorPaths for MapStruct and Hibernate JPA metamodel generation, replacing the legacy maven-processor-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: The maven-processor-plugin is deprecated and incompatible with modern annotation processing standards required by JDK 11+ toolchains; failing to switch causes annotation processors to not run or conflict with the compiler plugin.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Liquibase plugin dependencies to use liquibase-hibernate5 instead of liquibase-hibernate4.
pom.xml.why_exists: liquibase-hibernate4 relies on Hibernate 4 APIs which are removed or incompatible in the Spring Boot 2.x / JDK 11 stack, causing runtime failures during schema generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace JJWT dependencies with modularized jjwt-api, jjwt-impl, and jjwt-jackson artifacts.
pom.xml.why_exists: The legacy monolithic JJWT artifact is incompatible with JDK 11 module system and newer Spring Boot versions; using the split artifacts is required for correct runtime resolution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Spring Cloud Connectors dependencies (cloudfoundry, spring-service, localconfig).
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud Connectors are deprecated and removed in newer Spring Cloud versions compatible with JDK 11; retaining them causes compilation errors or missing class exceptions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Exclude junit-vintage-engine from spring-boot-starter-test.
pom.xml.why_exists: JUnit 4 support is deprecated; excluding the vintage engine ensures tests run on JUnit 5 platform, preventing potential conflicts or deprecation warnings in JDK 11 environments.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add ArchUnit dependencies for JUnit 5 architectural testing.
Add Zalando Problem Spring Web dependency for standardized error responses.
Replace Spark metrics reporter with Micrometer Prometheus registry.
Add JIB Maven plugin for container image building.
Add Checkstyle plugin with nohttp-checkstyle dependency.
Add Git Commit ID plugin for build metadata.
Update JaCoCo plugin configuration to separate unit and integration test coverage reports.
Update Maven Enforcer plugin to require Java version range [1.8,16).
Remove maven-sortpom-plugin and maven-eclipse-plugin configuration from main plugins.
Remove Gatling Maven plugin configuration.
Update Liquibase plugin configuration to use liquibase-core and add validation-api dependency.
Add properties-maven-plugin to read sonar-project.properties.
Update Maven Resources plugin to filter YAML configuration files.
Add Frontend Maven plugin for Node.js/NPM integration.
Update Maven WAR plugin configuration to exclude web.xml and set static resources directory.
Add Maven Javadoc plugin configuration.
Add Maven Failsafe plugin for integration tests.
Add Maven IDEA plugin configuration.
Add Spring Security Test dependency.
Add Spring Boot Test dependency.
Add Dropwizard Metrics Core dependency.
Remove explicit version from Spring Security Data dependency.
Remove Spring Boot Starter Tomcat exclusion from Spring Boot Starter Web.
Reorder Spring Boot Starter dependencies (Thymeleaf, Web, Test).
Add default goal spring-boot:run to build section.
Remove Eclipse m2e lifecycle mapping plugin management.
Update Liquibase reference URL to include Hibernate naming strategies.
Add contexts configuration to Liquibase plugin.
Update Liquibase username configuration.
Add JAX-RS runtime dependency to annotation processor paths.
Add Spring Boot Configuration Processor to annotation processor paths.
Add Hibernate JPA Metamodel Generator to annotation processor paths.
Update Maven Enforcer plugin to add DependencyConvergence rule.
Update Maven Enforcer plugin message for Java version.
pom.xml.before: <message>You are running an older version of Java. JHipster requires at least JDK ${java.version}</message>
pom.xml.after: <message>You are running an incompatible version of Java. JHipster supports JDK 8 to 15.</message>

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Enforcer plugin message for Maven version.
pom.xml.before: <message>You are running an older version of Maven. JHipster requires at least Maven 3.0</message>
pom.xml.after: <message>You are running an older version of Maven. JHipster requires at least Maven ${maven.version}</message>

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Maven Clean plugin configuration.
Update Maven Eclipse plugin configuration.
Update Maven Surefire plugin configuration.
Update Maven Resources plugin to use default delimiters.
Add JHipster needle comments for dependency and plugin injection.
Update file mode from 100755 to 100644.
Update the embedded web server dependency from Tomcat to Undertow in the production profile.
Replace the Yeoman-based frontend build plugin with the frontend-maven-plugin to support Webpack.
Add the maven-failsafe-plugin configuration for running integration tests.
Add the sonar-maven-plugin for code quality analysis.
Add the git-commit-id-plugin to include git information in the build.
Add the maven-war-plugin for WAR packaging support.
Add the lifecycle-mapping plugin for Eclipse m2e compatibility.
Add the H2 in-memory database dependency for development and testing.
Add the spring-boot-devtools dependency for development-time features.
Add the mapstruct-processor dependency for IDE support.
Add the hibernate-jpamodelgen dependency for IDE support.
Refactor Maven profiles to separate concerns like webpack, tls, and no-liquibase.
Update the maven-clean-plugin filesets to clean the new static resource directory.
Add the build-info goal to the spring-boot-maven-plugin in the production profile.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replace the custom ASCII art banner with the standard JHipster Spring Boot banner template.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Migrate Spring Boot 1.x configuration structure to Spring Boot 2.x structure.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed support for Spring Boot 1.x configuration keys (e.g., 'metrics', 'cache' at root, 'spring.jpa.hibernate.naming-strategy'), causing configuration binding failures or ignored settings.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.before:
metrics:
    jmx.enabled: true
    spark:
        enabled: false

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Hibernate naming strategy property to Spring Boot 2.x compatible format.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: The property 'spring.jpa.hibernate.naming-strategy' was removed in Spring Boot 2.x; using it causes a binding error or is ignored, requiring migration to 'spring.jpa.hibernate.naming.physical-strategy' or removal if default is acceptable.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Migrate Ehcache region factory configuration to Spring Boot 2.x / Hibernate 5.x standards.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: The property 'hibernate.cache.region.factory_class' with value 'SingletonEhCacheRegionFactory' is deprecated/removed in newer Hibernate versions used by Spring Boot 2.x, causing cache initialization failures.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
jhipster:
  cache: # Cache configuration
    ehcache: # Ehcache configuration
      time-to-live-seconds: 3600

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Elasticsearch configuration from Transport client to REST client.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x / Spring Data Elasticsearch 3.x+ deprecated the Transport client in favor of the REST client; the old 'spring.data.elasticsearch.cluster-nodes' properties are no longer supported, causing connection failures.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
spring:
  data:
  elasticsearch:
    rest:
      uris: http://localhost:9200

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update DataSource configuration to use HikariCP explicitly and modernize H2 connection string.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x defaults to HikariCP but the configuration syntax changed; 'spring.datasource.dataSourceClassName' is no longer the primary way to configure the pool, and H2 URL parameters like 'DB_CLOSE_ON_EXIT' are recommended for stability.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.before:
spring:
    datasource:
        dataSourceClassName: org.h2.jdbcx.JdbcDataSource
        url: jdbc:h2:mem:jhipster;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add JHipster specific configuration properties for security, mail, and logging.
Add Spring Boot DevTools configuration for development profile.
Update logging configuration to use Spring Boot 2.x 'logging.level' structure.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
logging:
  level:
    ROOT: DEBUG
    tech.jhipster: DEBUG

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add CORS configuration for JHipster application.
Update message cache duration format to ISO 8601 duration string.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate datasource configuration from Tomcat JDBC to HikariCP to align with Spring Boot 2.x defaults.
Update MySQL JDBC URL to include modern connection parameters required for newer MySQL drivers.
Replace deprecated Hibernate naming strategy with standard configuration.
Update Ehcache region factory class to the version compatible with Hibernate 5.x.
Migrate Elasticsearch configuration from transport client to REST client.
Replace legacy metrics configuration with Spring Boot Actuator management properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.before:
metrics:
    jmx.enabled: true
    spark:
        enabled: false
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
management:
  metrics:
    export:
      prometheus:
        enabled: false

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Add JHipster specific security and cache configuration properties.
Enable server compression and graceful shutdown in production profile.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
server:
  port: 8080
  shutdown: graceful
  compression:
    enabled: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate from Spring Boot 1.x Actuator configuration to Spring Boot 2.x Actuator configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed the `management.security.enabled` and `security.basic.enabled` properties and changed the namespace for endpoint exposure from `endpoints.*` to `management.endpoints.*` and `management.endpoint.*`. Without this change, the application fails to start or actuator endpoints are not exposed correctly on the target JDK/Spring Boot version.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
management.security.enabled: true
security.basic.enabled: false
endpoints.jolokia.enabled: false
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      base-path: /management
      exposure:
        include: ['configprops', 'env', 'health', 'info', 'jhimetrics', 'logfile', 'loggers', 'prometheus', 'threaddump']
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: when_authorized

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate async task executor configuration from custom JHipster properties to standard Spring Boot `spring.task.execution` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: The custom `async` namespace is not recognized by Spring Boot 2.x auto-configuration for task executors. Using standard `spring.task.execution` ensures the thread pool is configured correctly by the framework.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  task:
    execution:
      thread-name-prefix: jhipster-elasticsearch-sample-application-task-
      pool:
        core-size: 2
        max-size: 50
        queue-capacity: 10000

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate mail configuration from custom JHipster properties to standard Spring Boot `spring.mail` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x expects mail configuration under `spring.mail`. The old custom `mail` namespace is not bound by default, causing mail services to fail to initialize with correct SMTP settings.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
mail:
    host: localhost
    port: 25
    username:
    password:
    protocol: smtp
    tls: false
    auth: false
    from: jhipster@localhost

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate JPA/Hibernate configuration to Spring Boot 2.x standard properties and update Hibernate dialect settings.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x changes the default Hibernate dialect and requires explicit configuration for `hibernate.jdbc.time_zone` to avoid timezone-related runtime errors. The old `hibernate.id.new_generator_mappings` is deprecated/removed in newer Hibernate versions bundled with Spring Boot 2.x.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  jpa:
    open-in-view: false
    properties:
      hibernate.jdbc.time_zone: UTC
      hibernate.id.new_generator_mappings: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Update Swagger/Springfox configuration to match Spring Boot 2.x and JHipster 6.x structure.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x changes the servlet path structure and Springfox integration. The old `swagger` namespace and properties are not compatible with the new JHipster/Springfox setup, leading to API documentation not being generated or accessible.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
swagger:
    title: jhipster API
    description: jhipster applications and beyond!
    version: 0.0.1
    termsOfServiceUrl: http://jhipster.github.io/
    contact:
    license: Apache 2.0
    licenseUrl: http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.html
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
jhipster:
  api-docs:
    default-include-pattern: /api/.*
    title: jhipsterElasticsearchSampleApplication API
    description: jhipsterElasticsearchSampleApplication API documentation
    version: 0.0.1
    terms-of-service-url:
    contact-name:
    contact-url:
    contact-email:
    license: unlicensed
    license-url:

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x management endpoint health group and probe configurations.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x introduces health groups and liveness/readiness probes for Kubernetes compatibility. While not strictly a compile error, the absence of these configurations in a JHipster 6.x app (targeting J11) means the application won't behave correctly in containerized environments expecting these standard endpoints.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  health:
    group:
      liveness:
        include: livenessState
      readiness:
        include: readinessState,datasource
    probes:
      enabled: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Prometheus metrics export configuration for Spring Boot 2.x Actuator.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x Actuator uses Micrometer for metrics. The old Jolokia/JMX bridge is replaced by Prometheus. Without this configuration, metrics are not exported in the expected format for monitoring tools.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  metrics:
    export:
      prometheus:
        enabled: true
        step: 60

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Configure server servlet session cookie security settings.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x provides standard properties for session cookie security. This ensures http-only cookies are set by default, improving security posture.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
server:
  servlet:
    session:
      cookie:
        http-only: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add JHipster specific application properties for client app name and CORS.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: JHipster 6.x expects these properties for frontend integration and CORS handling. Missing them may cause frontend-backend communication issues.
